top_signals.title: Military Metals sinks on revoked Slovak antimony project licence
top_signals.summary: Trojarova, located near the capital city Bratislava, represents an advanced exploration stage project with considerable mining history.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Pulsar Helium acquires 1,360 acres for $2.4M at Topaz project in Minnesota
top_signals.summary: Topaz is one of the leading primary helium discoveries in the US, the company said.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
